name: basemind
description: Full AI context layer over MCP — tree-sitter code-map, document RAG (PDF/Office/HTML/email + OCR + reranker), shared agent memory, on-demand web crawl, git history + blame + per-symbol diff. 300+ languages, 8 coding-agent harnesses, content-addressed Fjall + LanceDB.

interface.shortDescription: Code-map MCP server for navigating large codebases
interface.longDescription: basemind indexes a repository with tree-sitter and exposes a structured code map — outlines, references, callers, history, blame, diff — over MCP. Designed for AI agents to navigate unfamiliar code without reading every file.
defaultPrompt: What changed in this file in the last 20 commits?
